sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂבכה

Transliteration: śebâkâh

Phonetic: seb-aw-kaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. network, lattice-work, net, netting
    1. lattice
    2. net-ornament (on pillars)
    3. network, toils (for catching animals)

Origin: from H7638

TWOT entry: 2230b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
